sentences.target: Ich helfe dem Migranten mit dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːm miˈɡʁantən mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich helfe dem Migranten mit dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːm miˈɡʁantən mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/
translations.en: I’m helping the migrant with the form.
translations.es: Estoy ayudando a un migrante con el formulario.
translations.fr: J’aide un migrant à remplir le formulaire.
translations.it: Sto aiutando un migrante con il modulo.
translations.ko: 저는 이주민이 양식을 작성하는 걸 도와주고 있어요.
translations.pt: Estou ajudando um migrante com o formulário.
translations.he: אני עוזר למהגר למלא את הטופס.
translations.tr: Bir göçmene formu doldurmasında yardımcı oluyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giúp một người di cư điền mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: Ik help een migrant met het formulier.
translations.hu: Egy migránsnak segítek kitölteni a nyomtatványt.
translations.hi: मैं एक प्रवासी को फॉर्म भरने में मदद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω έναν μετανάστη να συμπληρώσει τη φόρμα.
translations.nb: Jeg hjelper en migrant med skjemaet.
translations.id: Saya membantu seorang migran mengisi formulir.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper en migrant med blanketten.
translations.ro: Îl ajut pe un migrant să completeze formularul.
translations.da: Jeg hjælper en migrant med blanketten.
translations.ja: 私は移民の人が書類を書くのを手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'helfe'.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular, active, indicative; intransitive verb that selects a dative object (beneficiary) and can take an instrumental PP with 'mit + Dativ'.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; determiner of 'Migranten'.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; head of the indirect object governed by 'helfen' (recipient/beneficiary).
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental phrase indicating means ('with').
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of 'Formular'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit' (instrument).

sentences.target: Der Migrant wohnt jetzt bei uns nebenan.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ miˈɡʁant voːnt jɛtst baɪ̯ ʊns ˌneːbənˈan/

translations.de: Der Migrant wohnt jetzt bei uns nebenan.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ miˈɡʁant voːnt jɛtst baɪ̯ ʊns ˌneːbənˈan/
translations.en: The migrant lives next door now.
translations.es: Ahora un migrante vive al lado.
translations.fr: Un migrant habite maintenant à côté de chez nous.
translations.it: Ora un migrante vive accanto a noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个移民现在就住在我们隔壁。
translations.yue: 而家有個移民住喺隔籬。
translations.ru: Теперь у нас по соседству живёт мигрант.
translations.pt: Agora um migrante mora ao lado.
translations.tr: Artık yan dairede bir göçmen oturuyor.
translations.vi: Bây giờ có một người di cư sống ngay bên cạnh.
translations.nl: Er woont nu een migrant naast ons.
translations.uk: Тепер у нас поруч живе мігрант.
translations.hi: अब हमारे बगल वाले घर में एक प्रवासी रहता है.
translations.el: Τώρα ένας μετανάστης μένει δίπλα μας.
translations.nb: Nå bor det en migrant ved siden av oss.
translations.id: Sekarang ada seorang migran yang tinggal di sebelah.
translations.sv: Nu bor det en migrant bredvid oss.
translations.ro: Acum un migrant locuiește lângă noi.
translations.da: Nu bor der en migrant ved siden af os.
translations.ja: 今はうちの隣に移民の人が住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Migrant'.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of 'wohnt'.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular, active, indicative; intransitive, takes locative/temporal modifiers.
Temporal adverb modifying 'wohnt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative complement ('at/with').
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural dative; object of 'bei' (location relative to the speaker).
Locative adverb; further specifies location relative to 'uns'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester berät einen Migranten im Jugendzentrum.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ bəˈʁɛːt ˈaɪ̯nən miˈɡʁantən ɪm ˈjuːɡn̩t͡sɛntrʊm/

translations.de: Meine Schwester berät einen Migranten im Jugendzentrum.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ bəˈʁɛːt ˈaɪ̯nən miˈɡʁantən ɪm ˈjuːɡn̩t͡sɛntrʊm/
translations.en: My sister advises a migrant at the youth center.
translations.es: Mi hermana orienta a un migrante en el centro juvenil.
translations.fr: Ma sœur conseille un migrant au centre pour jeunes.
translations.it: Mia sorella consiglia un migrante al centro giovanile.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 청소년센터에서 이주민 한 명을 상담해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹在青年中心给一名移民出主意。
translations.yue: 我姐姐喺青年中心畀一個移民意見。
translations.ru: Моя сестра консультирует мигранта в молодёжном центре.
translations.pt: Minha irmã orienta um migrante no centro juvenil.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim gençlik merkezinde bir göçmene danışmanlık yapıyor.
translations.vi: Chị tôi tư vấn cho một người di cư ở trung tâm thanh niên.
translations.ar: أختي تُقدّم المشورة لمهاجر في مركز الشباب.
translations.nl: Mijn zus geeft een migrant advies in het jongerencentrum.
translations.uk: Моя сестра консультує мігранта в молодіжному центрі.
translations.hu: A nővérem egy migránsnak ad tanácsot az ifjúsági központban.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन युवा केंद्र में एक प्रवासी को सलाह देती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra doradza migrantowi w ośrodku młodzieżowym.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου συμβουλεύει έναν μετανάστη στο κέντρο νέων.
translations.nb: Søsteren min gir råd til en migrant på ungdomssenteret.
translations.id: Kakak saya memberi saran kepada seorang migran di pusat remaja.
translations.sv: Min syster ger råd till en migrant på ungdomscentret.
translations.ro: Sora mea îl sfătuiește pe un migrant la centrul de tineret.
translations.cs: Moje sestra radí migrantovi v centru pro mládež.
translations.da: Min søster rådgiver en migrant på ungdomscentret.
translations.ja: 私の妹は青少年センターで移民の人の相談に乗っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Schwester' and marks possession.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'berät'.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular, active, indicative; transitive verb selecting an accusative object and allowing a locative PP.
Indefinite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Migranten'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object (patient) of 'berät'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (location of the advising).

sentences.target: Im Bus fragt ein Migrant nach der Adresse.
sentences.reading: /ɪm bʊs fʁaːkt aɪ̯n miˈɡʁant naːx deːɐ̯ aˈdʁɛsə/

translations.de: Im Bus fragt ein Migrant nach der Adresse.
translations.ipa: /ɪm bʊs fʁaːkt aɪ̯n miˈɡʁant naːx deːɐ̯ aˈdʁɛsə/
translations.en: On the bus, a migrant asks for the address.
translations.es: En el autobús, un migrante pregunta por la dirección.
translations.fr: Dans le bus, un migrant demande l’adresse.
translations.it: In autobus, un migrante chiede l’indirizzo.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公交车上，有个移民在问地址。
translations.yue: 喺巴士上面，有個移民問地址。
translations.pt: No ônibus, um migrante pergunta o endereço.
translations.vi: Trên xe buýt, một người di cư hỏi địa chỉ.
translations.ar: في الحافلة، يسأل مهاجر عن العنوان.
translations.nl: In de bus vraagt een migrant naar het adres.
translations.hu: A buszon egy migráns a címet kérdezi.
translations.hi: बस में एक प्रवासी पता पूछता है.
translations.pl: W autobusie migrant pyta o adres.
translations.el: Στο λεωφορείο ένας μετανάστης ρωτά για τη διεύθυνση.
translations.nb: På bussen spør en migrant etter adressen.
translations.id: Di bus, seorang migran menanyakan alamat.
translations.sv: På bussen frågar en migrant efter adressen.
translations.ro: În autobuz, un migrant întreabă de adresă.
translations.cs: V autobuse se migrant ptá na adresu.
translations.da: På bussen spørger en migrant om adressen.
translations.ja: バスの中で、移民の人が住所を聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative setting.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of 'Im' (location).

Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of 'fragt'.

En el autobús, un migrante pregunta por la dirección.

Un migrant habite maintenant à côté de chez nous.

Dans le bus, un migrant demande l’adresse.
